nasb.text: Their relatives among all the families of Issachar were mighty men of valor, enrolled by genealogy, in all 87,000.

esv.text: Their kinsmen belonging to all the clans of Issachar were in all 87,000 mighty warriors, enrolled by genealogy.

cnv.text: 他們的兄弟在以薩迦各族中，都是英勇的戰士，按著家譜登記的，共有八萬七千人。

ccb.text: 按家谱的记载，以萨迦支派的各族中共有八万七千个英勇的战士。
